emails.subject: Re: "White Paper"
emails.body: Vince Vasant, The enclosed document discusses the incorporation of detailed ensemble outputs into our mark-to-marketing routines. In the next few days I will schedule an update on SMUD and perhaps we could spend a few minutes discussing how to proceed with this. Joe Forwarded by Joseph Hrgovcic/HOU/ECT on 10/26/2000 12:55 PM Please respond to dchang@aer.com

emails.subject: Re: "White Paper"
emails.body: Joe, I could not open the document. Vince Joseph Hrgovcic 10/26/2000 01:10 PM
